spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) FROM agent_usage WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], model) AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id) AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name) AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name) AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name) AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)) AS "Tokens (all time)",
  (SELECT sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) FROM agent_usage WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], model) AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id) AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name) AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name) AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name) AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)) AS "Tokens (period)",
  (SELECT sum(cost) FROM agent_usage WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], model) AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id) AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name) AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name) AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name) AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)) AS "Cost (all time)",
  (SELECT sum(cost) FROM agent_usage WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], model) AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id) AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name) AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name) AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name) AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)) AS "Cost (period)",
  (SELECT count(DISTINCT user_id) FROM agent_events WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id) AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id) AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name) AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name) AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name) AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))) AS "Users"

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT u.timestamp AS time, u.user_id AS metric,
    u.input_tokens AS in_val, u.output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

SELECT
  u.timestamp AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  u.cost AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', if(u.agent_version = '', u.agent_name, concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version))) AS metric,
    u.input_tokens AS in_val,
    u.output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    if(skill_version = '', skill_name, concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)) AS metric,
    input_tokens AS in_val,
    output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND skill_name != ''
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', if(u.agent_version = '', u.agent_name, concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version))) AS metric,
    u.input_cost AS in_val,
    u.output_cost AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    if(u.skill_version = '', u.skill_name, concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)) AS metric,
    u.input_cost AS in_val,
    u.output_cost AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND u.skill_name != ''
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by MCP tool over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    replaceOne(mcp_tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS metric,
    input_tokens AS in_val,
    output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND mcp_tool_name != ''
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost by MCP tool over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    replaceOne(u.mcp_tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS metric,
    u.input_cost AS in_val,
    u.output_cost AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND u.mcp_tool_name != ''
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by model & scope over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    concat(multiIf(agent_name != '', 'subagent', skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', model) AS metric,
    input_tokens AS in_val,
    output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost by model & scope over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    concat(multiIf(u.agent_name != '', 'subagent', u.skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', u.model) AS metric,
    u.input_cost AS in_val,
    u.output_cost AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache hit rate by agent/skill/model over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    concat(multiIf(agent_name != '', 'subagent', skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', model) AS metric,
    cache_read_tokens AS cache_read,
    input_tokens AS input_tok
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT time, metric, cache_read / nullIf(cache_read + input_tok, 0) AS value
FROM filtered
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  u.user_id,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY cost DESC

WITH session_durations_period AS (
  SELECT session_id, user_id, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  GROUP BY session_id, user_id
),
session_durations_all AS (
  SELECT session_id, user_id, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  GROUP BY session_id, user_id
),
user_duration_period AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(duration_s) AS duration_s FROM session_durations_period GROUP BY user_id
),
user_duration_all AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(duration_s) AS duration_s FROM session_durations_all GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  u.user_id,
  sum(u.input_tokens) AS tokens_in,
  sum(u.output_tokens) AS tokens_out,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  any(udp.duration_s) AS session_duration_period_s,
  any(uda.duration_s) AS session_duration_all_s
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN user_duration_period udp ON udp.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN user_duration_all uda ON uda.user_id = u.user_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY (tokens_in + tokens_out) DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS time,
  uniqExact(user_id) AS active_users,
  uniqExact(session_id) AS sessions
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  tool_name,
  countIf(status = 'success') AS successes,
  countIf(status = 'failure') AS failures,
  countIf(status = 'failure') / nullIf(countIf(status = 'success') + countIf(status = 'failure'), 0) AS error_rate
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY error_rate DESC

SELECT
  tool_name,
  quantile(0.5)(latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND status = 'success'
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC

SELECT
  tool_name,
  countIf(status = 'success') AS calls,
  countIf(status = 'failure') AS failures,
  quantile(0.5)(latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY calls DESC

SELECT
  timestamp,
  user_id,
  session_id,
  tool_name,
  substring(JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'response', 'choices', 1, 'message', 'tool_calls', 1, 'function', 'arguments'), 1, 300) AS tool_detail,
  latency_ms
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND status = 'success'
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
ORDER BY latency_ms DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Error rate over time by tool_name

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  tool_name AS metric,
  countIf(status = 'failure') / nullIf(countIf(status IN ('success', 'failure')), 0) AS value
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Full trace of selected session(s) - click the magnifier on prompt/response/raw_payload to see full text
spec.description: Requires an explicit, partial session selection - returns nothing when 0 or literally all available sessions are selected, since either means "no real filter" and would otherwise pull every raw_payload in the table.

spec.rawSql:
WITH selected_session_count AS (
  SELECT count() AS n FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([${session_id:singlequote}]) AS s) WHERE s != ''
),
available_session_count AS (
  SELECT countDistinct(session_id) AS n FROM agent_events WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
)
SELECT
  ev.user_id,
  ev.session_id,
  ev.turn_id,
  ev.sequence_id,
  ev.timestamp,
  ev.event_type,
  ev.tool_name,
  substring(JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'response', 'choices', 1, 'message', 'tool_calls', 1, 'function', 'arguments'), 1, 300) AS tool_detail,
  ev.agent_name,
  ev.agent_version,
  ev.skill_name,
  ev.skill_version,
  ev.status,
  ev.latency_ms,
  m.prompt_text,
  m.response_text,
  ev.raw_payload
FROM agent_events ev
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = ev.session_id AND m.timestamp = ev.timestamp
WHERE has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], ev.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], ev.skill_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(ev.tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], ev.tool_name))
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], ev.command_name)
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
ORDER BY ev.session_id, ev.turn_id ASC, ev.sequence_id ASC

spec.title: Call stack for selected session(s)
spec.description: Requires an explicit, partial session selection - returns nothing when 0 or literally all available sessions are selected, since either means "no real filter" and would otherwise pull every call across every session at once.

spec.rawSql:
WITH selected_session_count AS (
  SELECT count() AS n FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([${session_id:singlequote}]) AS s) WHERE s != ''
),
available_session_count AS (
  SELECT countDistinct(session_id) AS n FROM agent_events WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
),
usage_by_call AS (
  SELECT u.session_id, u.timestamp,
    sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tok,
    sum(u.cost) AS cost
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
    AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
    AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
  GROUP BY u.session_id, u.timestamp
)
SELECT
  ev.timestamp AS time,
  ev.session_id AS session_id,
  concat(
    if(ev.agent_name != '', concat('[', ev.agent_name, if(ev.agent_version != '', concat(' v', ev.agent_version), ''), '] '), ''),
    if(ev.command_name != '', concat('/', ev.command_name, ' '), ''),
    if(ev.skill_name != '', concat('(', ev.skill_name, if(ev.skill_version != '', concat(' v', ev.skill_version), ''), ') '), ''),
    if(ev.tool_name = '', 'reply', concat(
      ev.tool_name,
      ' `', substring(replaceRegexpAll(JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'response', 'choices', 1, 'message', 'tool_calls', 1, 'function', 'arguments'), '\\s+', ' '), 1, 70), '`'
    )),
    if(ev.status = 'failure', ' [FAIL]', ''),
    if(ev.latency_ms IS NOT NULL, concat(' - ', toString(ev.latency_ms), 'ms'), ''),
    if(u.tok > 0, concat(' - ', toString(u.tok), ' tok - $', toString(round(u.cost, 4))), '')
  ) AS call,
  ev.raw_payload AS raw_payload
FROM agent_events ev
LEFT JOIN usage_by_call u ON u.session_id = ev.session_id AND u.timestamp = ev.timestamp
WHERE has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], ev.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], ev.skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], ev.command_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(ev.tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], ev.tool_name))
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
ORDER BY ev.session_id, ev.timestamp

SELECT
  u.session_id,
  u.user_id,
  any(ev.started_at) AS started_at,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  any(ev.duration_s) AS duration_s
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, min(timestamp) AS started_at, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  GROUP BY session_id
) ev ON u.session_id = ev.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY u.session_id, u.user_id
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Top 10 most expensive prompts by tokens

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  u.session_id,
  u.user_id,
  u.agent_name,
  m.prompt_text,
  m.response_text,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = u.session_id AND m.timestamp = u.timestamp
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY u.session_id, u.user_id, u.agent_name, m.prompt_text, m.response_text
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Current agent/skill versions
spec.description: Currently always empty: agent_registry/skill_registry are only ever written by the retired transcript-reading hooks pipeline (.claude/hooks/register_agents.py, deleted). Nothing in the current LiteLLM-only ingestion path writes to these tables. Needs a future client-side hook to populate again - not a query bug.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 'agent' AS kind, agent_name AS name, version, description, registered_at
FROM agent_registry
WHERE (agent_name, registered_at) IN (
  SELECT agent_name, max(registered_at) FROM agent_registry GROUP BY agent_name
)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'skill' AS kind, skill_name AS name, version, description, registered_at
FROM skill_registry
WHERE (skill_name, registered_at) IN (
  SELECT skill_name, max(registered_at) FROM skill_registry GROUP BY skill_name
)
ORDER BY kind, name

spec.title: Agent version-change impact (before vs after adopting current version)
spec.description: Empty until an agent/skill actually has 2+ distinct versions observed in agent_usage - by design, this shows nothing for a brand-new agent/skill on its first version. Not a query bug.

spec.rawSql:
WITH usage_f AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
),
events_f AS (
  SELECT * FROM agent_events
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
),
version_starts AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version, min(timestamp) AS started_at
  FROM usage_f
  WHERE agent_name != ''
  GROUP BY agent_name, agent_version
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT *,
    lagInFrame(agent_version) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_version,
    lagInFrame(started_at) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_started_at,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at DESC) AS rn
  FROM version_starts
),
transitions AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version AS current_version, started_at, prev_version, prev_started_at
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = 1 AND prev_version != ''
),
usage_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_tokens_after,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_cost_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at
),
usage_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_tokens_before,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_cost_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at), 0) AS error_rate_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at), 0) AS error_rate_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
)
SELECT
  ua.agent_name, ua.prev_version, ua.current_version, ua.started_at,
  ub.avg_tokens_before, ua.avg_tokens_after,
  ub.avg_cost_before, ua.avg_cost_after,
  eb.error_rate_before, ea.error_rate_after
FROM usage_after ua
LEFT JOIN usage_before ub ON ub.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ub.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_after ea ON ea.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ea.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_before eb ON eb.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND eb.current_version = ua.current_version
ORDER BY ua.agent_name

spec.title: Skill version-change impact (before vs after adopting current version)
spec.description: Empty until an agent/skill actually has 2+ distinct versions observed in agent_usage - by design, this shows nothing for a brand-new agent/skill on its first version. Not a query bug.

spec.rawSql:
WITH usage_f AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
),
events_f AS (
  SELECT * FROM agent_events
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
),
version_starts AS (
  SELECT skill_name, skill_version, min(timestamp) AS started_at
  FROM usage_f
  WHERE skill_name != ''
  GROUP BY skill_name, skill_version
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT *,
    lagInFrame(skill_version) OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_version,
    lagInFrame(started_at) OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_started_at,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at DESC) AS rn
  FROM version_starts
),
transitions AS (
  SELECT skill_name, skill_version AS current_version, started_at, prev_version, prev_started_at
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = 1 AND prev_version != ''
),
usage_after AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_tokens_after,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_cost_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.skill_name = t.skill_name AND uf.skill_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at
),
usage_before AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_tokens_before,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_cost_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.skill_name = t.skill_name AND uf.skill_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
),
events_after AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at), 0) AS error_rate_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.skill_name = t.skill_name AND ev.skill_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
),
events_before AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at), 0) AS error_rate_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.skill_name = t.skill_name AND ev.skill_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
)
SELECT
  ua.skill_name, ua.prev_version, ua.current_version, ua.started_at,
  ub.avg_tokens_before, ua.avg_tokens_after,
  ub.avg_cost_before, ua.avg_cost_after,
  eb.error_rate_before, ea.error_rate_after
FROM usage_after ua
LEFT JOIN usage_before ub ON ub.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND ub.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_after ea ON ea.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND ea.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_before eb ON eb.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND eb.current_version = ua.current_version
ORDER BY ua.skill_name

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT toStartOfDay(u.timestamp) AS time, u.user_id AS metric,
    sum(u.input_tokens) AS in_val, sum(u.output_tokens) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfDay(u.timestamp) AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  sum(u.cost) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  sum(u.cost) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  concat(multiIf(u.agent_name != '', 'subagent', u.skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', u.model) AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  concat(multiIf(u.agent_name != '', 'subagent', u.skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', u.model) AS metric,
  sum(u.cost) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    command_name AS metric,
    input_tokens AS in_val,
    output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND command_name != ''
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    u.command_name AS metric,
    u.input_cost AS in_val,
    u.output_cost AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND u.command_name != ''
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name)
    AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id)
    AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name)
    AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name)
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Failed tool calls
spec.description: Tool executions that returned an error (tool_result is_error=true), not LLM-API-level failures (those never carry a tool_name - see agent_events.status). Recovered from "messages" at ingest time only, so this has no historical backfill - only shows failures from calls ingested after this panel was added.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp,
  user_id,
  session_id,
  failed_tool_name AS tool_name,
  failed_tool_args AS arguments,
  failed_tool_error AS error
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND failed_tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)
  AND has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name)
  AND has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name)
  AND has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name)
  AND (NOT startsWith(failed_tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], failed_tool_name))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT DISTINCT agent_name AS __value, agent_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE agent_name != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(none - main session)' AS __text
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT skill_name AS __value, skill_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE skill_name != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(none - no skill)' AS __text
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT command_name AS __value, command_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE command_name != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(none - no command)' AS __text
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT
  tool_name AS __value,
  replaceOne(tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS __text
FROM agent_events
WHERE startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(none - not an MCP call)' AS __text
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT model AS __value, model AS __text FROM agent_usage WHERE model != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(none - no usage yet)' AS __text
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT user_id AS __value, user_id AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE user_id != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(none - no events yet)' AS __text
ORDER BY __value

SELECT __value, __text FROM (
  SELECT
    session_id AS __value,
    concat(any(user_id), ' - ', session_id) AS __text,
    max(timestamp) AS __ts
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  GROUP BY session_id
  ORDER BY __ts DESC
  LIMIT 200
)
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(none - no sessions yet)' AS __text
